name: W3C Decentralized Identifiers
allowed_use_boundary: Use DID documents and verification methods as identity or control evidence only.
claims: DIDs define identifiers, verification methods, services, and controller relationships.
non_claims: Identifier control is not execution authority.
Resolution success is not transition admissibility.

transition_table_mapping.evidence_model: official draft source plus bounded crosswalk
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: DID documents support identity and control reconstruction
transition_table_mapping.SPE_overlap: identity evidence may inform standing review
transition_table_mapping.fail_closed_conditions: missing source status, resolution context, mapping, or authority overclaim
